Entry.JapaneseText: コハク……やっぱりついてくるの？ 危ないし、コハクにまたなにかあったら……
Entry.EnglishText: Kohaku... you're coming after all? It's dangerous. If something happened to you again...

Entry.JapaneseText: シング！ もう言わないの！ それに、シングが世界を滅ぼしかけたのは わたしのせいでもあるんだから
Entry.EnglishText: Shing! No more of that! Besides, it's my fault, too, that you had almost destroyed the world.

Entry.JapaneseText: 一人で全部引き受けようなんてズルいよ。 わたしだって頑張らなきゃ
Entry.EnglishText: It's not fair for you to take responsibility for that by yourself. I have to do my best, too.

Entry.JapaneseText: わかった、一緒にガンドコいこう！
Entry.EnglishText: Got it. Let's go be awesome together!
Entry.Notes: Uses Shing's ガンドコ, which is specific to him and has no actual meaning. The "official" Hearts R translation is an entire sentences for a single word and I think there's a pretty common "this loc sucks for legitimate reasons" sentiment among JP speakers for Hearts R, so I'd rather not use that. I may change this later, but for now, I'm using this so I can avoid debating too long on it.
